note: Reference fingerprints for common browsers. JA4 a-segments and Akamai HTTP/2 strings are stable and well documented; JA4 b/c hashes drift between browser builds. Treat entries marked approximate as guidance and capture your own reference with `fpcheck report` against the exact browser you target.

profiles.name: chrome131
profiles.accuracy: verified: ja4 a+b stable across Chrome 120-131; c matches ~Chrome 124-131

profiles.name: chrome142
profiles.description: Chrome 133+ desktop (after the post-131 signature-algorithm change)
profiles.accuracy: approximate: ja4 a+b stable as Chrome, c changed after 131 - capture locally to pin c

profiles.name: firefox
profiles.accuracy: approximate: ja4 a-segment verified (t13d1715h2); hashes vary by version
